name: guru-discover-change-context
description: Discover fresh current and archived change context, run the semantic evidence gate, and produce a portable snapshot before Guru Team requirement clarification.

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, active package inventory and declared runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated by run-skill-command before every runtime command

entry_preconditions.evidence: validator-passed guru-base-sync-result-1.0 with selected base, decision checkout, base HEAD and post_sync_resolution_sha256
entry_preconditions.binding: repository, selected base, decision checkout and clean synchronized HEAD
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated before live change, current-state or history reads and again before snapshot acceptance

entry_preconditions.evidence: Git toplevel, normalized GitHub owner/repository and selected base ref
entry_preconditions.binding: portable repository identity without machine-local paths
entry_preconditions.freshness: must still describe the live decision checkout

entry_preconditions.evidence: issue, request, paths, commands, config keys, schema fields or symbols
entry_preconditions.freshness: query digest and live issue/proposed draft identity remain unchanged

entry_preconditions.evidence: live change digest, reviewed Git blobs, query digest, archive manifest digest and snapshot digest
entry_preconditions.binding: the exact current/history evidence reviewed by the AI gate
entry_preconditions.freshness: objective validator rereads every live binding before context_ready

validators.objective_scope: canonical query, finish-summary index-only manifest, deterministic score/sort/limit/projection, invalid isolation and preview digests

canonical snapshot identity, ordered external ancestor plus independently retained refresh-receipt binding and reread, stdout-only pre-task output, Git-trackable target gate and exact same-snapshot task-local persistence

closed result shape, AI-authored gate evidence, ordered external ancestor plus independently retained refresh-receipt binding, Git-trackable task target, digest bindings, live freshness, candidate/mem rules and typed-exit identity

external_exits.evidence: fresh current/history snapshot with passed AI Review Gate and objective validation
stale base, live change, reviewed blob, query, archive manifest or snapshot binding
invalid input, unsafe path, contract failure or semantic gate unable to pass safely

reentry.identity: mode, repository, base post-sync digest, change-input digest, live-change digest, query digest, archive-manifest digest and ordered externally verified superseded snapshot ancestry with independently retained refresh receipts
reentry.freshness: all live bindings are revalidated before acceptance; stale evidence restarts the complete Skill
